query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, c.name as cat FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = (SELECT id FROM establishments WHERE name LIKE '%Sushi%' LIMIT 1) ORDER BY c.name, p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, c.name as cat FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = (SELECT id FROM establishments WHERE name LIKE '%Sushi%' LIMIT 1) ORDER BY c.name, p.name;
